title: navarretia latifolia
intro: Navarretia latifolia, also known as the broad-leaved navarretia or Pacific brodiaea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae. Native to the western coast of North America, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Navarretia latifolia include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Navarretia latifolia can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
